positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_mammal
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    ~has_teeth(platypus)).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    mammal(sK0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    has_teeth(human)).

cnf(u17,negated_conjecture,
    ~mammal(human)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    mammal(platypus)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    platypus != human).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    has_teeth(sK0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg_mammal
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~has_teeth(platypus)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    platypus != human).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    has_teeth(sK0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    has_teeth(human)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define mammal(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
